description: Runtime engine repo for Rust/Lua/GD implementations of Horror.Place runtime APIs, including H.* orchestration modules, engine adapters, and behavior wiring contracts.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: Runtime repo must not store raw narrative chapters; only contracts, code, and configuration.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All JSON artifacts (contracts, envelopes) must include a valid schemaRef pointing to an approved schema in this repo or HorrorPlace-Constellation-Contracts.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: All contract artifacts must include explicit target metadata (objectKind, tier, targetRepo, targetPath) for routing and registry binding.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: Any authoring or tooling that reads or writes contract artifacts here must use routingSpineRef for route resolution.

authoringHints.summary: T1-core engine runtime repo. Contains Rust/Lua/GD implementations of runtime APIs and behavior contracts that adapt constellation contracts into live engine behavior.
aiBehavior: Prefer generating behaviorContractCard, policyContractCard, styleContractCard, historySelectorPattern, historySelectorRule, dungeonNodeContract, eventContract, or regionContractCard files only when explicitly routed here via the spine.
Do not generate vault-only narrative or seed content in this repo.
Always verify schemaRef against schemaWhitelist before proposing or modifying JSON artifacts.
When generating or modifying mapFunctionAdapter code, reference contracts and regions by ID and objectKind, not by inlining contract data.
Assume that any contract written here will be consumed by Lua/GD adapters in enginelibrary/, and keep IDs, names, and invariants consistent with the routing spine.
